name: The Effect of Urolithin A (Mitopure) Supplementation on Muscle Strength in Healthy Middle-Aged Adults.
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov recruiting randomized triple-masked 120-participant Mitopure trial in healthy adults aged 40 to 65 years, with knee-flexion strength as the primary endpoint and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
